channel.title: Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Why IEnumerable Can Kill Performance in Hot Paths
item.description: For F1 racing, choosing the right car is as important as your expertise. No matter how skilled you are, if you race in an ordinary car, you can't stand out. You need to understand the race and use the F1 racing car. The same goes for programming. Going Link to article: https://blog.elmah.io/why-ienumerable-can-kill-performance-in-hot-paths/
